name: stratosort
description: Stratosort - Local AI Document Organizer with Ollama integration. Privacy-focused document organization using AI-powered analysis.

scripts.build:dll: echo 'DLL build not required for current setup'
scripts.validate: npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run typecheck && npm test
scripts.fix: npm run lint:fix && npm run format && npm run security:fix
scripts.check: npm run security:audit && npm run deps:check && npm run validate
scripts.package: rimraf dist && npm run build && electron-builder build --publish never
scripts.electron: npm run build:dev && cross-env NODE_ENV=development electron . --enable-logging
scripts.start:dev: npm run build:dev && cross-env NODE_ENV=development electron . --enable-logging
scripts.reset: npm run clean && npm run clean:deps
scripts.test:functionality:
node -e "console.log('🧪 Stratosort Comprehensive Test Suite'); console.log('=' .repeat(50)); console.log('
📋 Available Test Commands:'); console.log('   npm run test:run        - Run all tests with reporting'); console.log('   npm run test:full       - Full test suite with coverage'); console.log('   npm run test:quick      - Quick test run (stop on first failure)'); console.log('   npm run test:upload     - Test file upload functionality'); console.log('   npm run test:ai         - Test AI processing pipeline'); console.log('   npm run test:performance - Test performance & resources'); console.log('
🔍 Test Coverage:'); console.log('   • File upload & validation (drag-drop, size limits)'); console.log('   • Ollama AI integration (document analysis, categorization)'); console.log('   • Document lifecycle (state management, concurrency)'); console.log('   • UI behavior (progress tracking, empty states)'); console.log('   • Configuration (custom settings, folder naming)'); console.log('   • Error handling (corrupted files, network issues)'); console.log('   • Performance (memory usage, processing speed)'); console.log('
🚀 Quick Start:'); console.log('   npm run test:run'); console.log('
✅ Expected Results:'); console.log('   • 95%+ test pass rate'); console.log('   • Detailed HTML/JSON reports'); console.log('   • Performance metrics'); console.log('   • Error diagnostics');"
scripts.dist: npm run build && npx electron-builder --config electron-builder.json
scripts.dist:win: set NODE_ENV=production && npm run build && npx electron-builder --win --config electron-builder.json
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build && npx electron-builder --mac --config electron-builder.json
scripts.dist:linux: npm run build && npx electron-builder --linux --config electron-builder.json
scripts.dist:all: npm run build && npx electron-builder --mac --win --linux --config electron-builder.json
scripts.help:
node -e "console.log('🎯 STRATOSORT - NPM COMMANDS'); console.log('=' .repeat(50)); console.log('
🚨 PRE-PULL REQUEST (Essential):'); console.log('   npm run pre-pr      - 🔥 RUN BEFORE EVERY PR! Fixes + checks + build'); console.log('   npm run fix         - Auto-fix lint, format, and security issues'); console.log('   npm run check       - Comprehensive validation (security + deps + tests)'); console.log('
🚀 Starting the App:'); console.log('   npm start           - Full startup check + launch'); console.log('   npm run start:dev   - Development mode with logging'); console.log('   npm run start:debug - Debug mode with inspector'); console.log('   npm run start:quick - Quick launch (no checks)'); console.log('
🛠️ Code Quality & Maintenance:'); console.log('   npm run lint        - Check code style and errors'); console.log('   npm run lint:fix    - Auto-fix linting issues'); console.log('   npm run format      - Format all code with Prettier'); console.log('   npm run typecheck   - TypeScript type checking'); console.log('   npm run validate    - Run all quality checks'); console.log('
🔒 Security & Dependencies:'); console.log('   npm run security:audit - Check for security vulnerabilities'); console.log('   npm run security:fix   - Auto-fix security issues'); console.log('   npm run deps:check     - Check for outdated dependencies'); console.log('   npm run deps:update    - Update all dependencies'); console.log('
🔍 Diagnostics & Setup:'); console.log('   npm run setup       - Complete project setup (new installs)'); console.log('   npm run diagnose    - Health check and diagnostic report'); console.log('   npm run doctor      - Alias for diagnose'); console.log('
🧹 Cleanup:'); console.log('   npm run clean       - Remove build artifacts and cache'); console.log('   npm run clean:deps  - Clean and reinstall dependencies'); console.log('   npm run reset       - Full reset (clean + reinstall)'); console.log('
🤖 Ollama AI Management:'); console.log('   npm run setup:ollama - Complete Ollama setup'); console.log('   npm run check:ollama - Check Ollama status'); console.log('   npm run ollama:serve - Start Ollama service'); console.log('
🧪 Testing:'); console.log('   npm test            - Run test suite'); console.log('   npm run test:full   - Full test suite with coverage'); console.log('   npm run test:quick  - Quick test run (fail fast)'); console.log('   npm run verify      - View test guide'); console.log('
⚙️ Building:'); console.log('   npm run build       - Build for production'); console.log('   npm run build:dev   - Build for development'); console.log('
📦 Distribution:'); console.log('   npm run dist        - Build installer for current platform'); console.log('   npm run dist:win    - Windows installer (.exe, .msi)'); console.log('   npm run dist:mac    - macOS installer (.dmg)'); console.log('   npm run dist:linux  - Linux installer (.AppImage, .deb)'); console.log('   npm run dist:all    - Build for all platforms'); console.log('
💡 Quick Workflow:'); console.log('   1. Make changes'); console.log('   2. npm run pre-pr   ← 🔥 ALWAYS RUN THIS!'); console.log('   3. git commit & push'); console.log('   4. Create PR'); console.log('
🆘 Troubleshooting:'); console.log('   npm run diagnose    - Check what might be wrong'); console.log('   npm run reset       - Nuclear option: clean everything'); console.log('   npm run setup       - Re-run complete setup'); console.log('   npm run help        - Show this help'); console.log('
✨ Pro Tips:'); console.log('   • pre-pr script handles 99% of PR issues automatically'); console.log('   • Use diagnose when something seems broken'); console.log('   • setup script helps new team members get started'); console.log('   • fix script resolves most code quality issues');"
